Tbh, i wouldn't have complained that much if they actually did tried to implement some of the ideas i gave them to reduce RNG shit stuff
I had some ideas i gave them during the review patch thingy in mail
The idea was giving an icon like a the posse at the bottom of your screen that recharge based on dmg received
You can select 1 card of your choice
It doesn't count for self harm
So they have to think twice before attacking randomly
suggesting new game mechanic is always a small chance instead of just changing numbers/effect for balance
Right now it's like a clown fest
Who one shot first within turn 3
My ideas was to actually make people think
Instead of brain dead attacking randomly
Without any repercussions from otk turn 3

alright, let me give it a try
You equip SR wheel on gmurphy so when she exalt it's 75% dmg converted into sacrifice
And helot with the SSR wheel
So 25% of her dmg is converted into sacrifice
You use the backpack SR wheel to equip it on someone who doesn't have wheels
So it get converted into illusion card
The last wheel can be anything 1 cost if you want
The goal is to regen 20 lienus from Winkle 4 cost
Then winkle exalt on the 2 toughest enemies
You kill winkle with the posse that blighten every enemies
You almost killed everyone in their tem and they have 70 sacrifice stacks each

You can rely on them don't get me wrong, but need something to stall
You don't have anything to stall in case they have para or snipe or something else
Clem can stall by discarding enemies cards, tinct can cleanse debuffs and remove enemy buff while stagnation
Ramona is a brick for that team
